description: A customer who temporarily suspended their service has returned early from travel and wants to reactivate their line.

nodes.task_description: Identify the customer and confirm their account is currently under a vacation suspension.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent correctly identifies the account and its suspended status.

nodes.task_description: Explain any prorated charges that will result from early reactivation.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent clearly communicates the billing implications.

nodes.task_description: Remove the suspension from the customer's account.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully reactivates the service line.
